stories.title: 'Only Human: Bound' audio drama explores artificial intelligence
stories.simple_summary: A new audio drama called 'Only Human: Bound' tells stories about artificial intelligence.
stories.why_it_matters: This is just entertainment — nothing you need to do or worry about.

stories.title: Anthropic wants to develop its own drugs
stories.simple_summary: Anthropic, a company that makes AI tools, is creating new software to help scientists discover new medicines faster by organizing information and creating pictures of data.
stories.why_it_matters: This might eventually help develop medicines, but it doesn't affect you right now — mostly a story for scientists and investors.

stories.title: Mobile Artificial Intelligence Market Size to Surpass USD 322.21 Billion by 2035 | SNS Insider
stories.simple_summary: The market for AI software on phones and mobile devices is expected to grow very large in the coming years.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Don't throw away your shot to speak to an AI Alexander Hamilton at Boston's new finance museum
stories.simple_summary: A new museum in Boston has an AI chatbot that can pretend to be Alexander Hamilton and answer questions about money and history.
stories.why_it_matters: This is an interesting museum attraction, but nothing that affects your daily life.

stories.title: AI prey: why watchdogs are telling parents to protect children from nudification apps
stories.simple_summary: There are apps online that can use AI to fake nude pictures of people, and safety experts are warning parents to teach kids about this danger.
stories.why_it_matters: If you have children or grandchildren, this is important to know about — talk to them about not sharing photos online and about these dangerous apps.

stories.title: A behind-the-scenes look at Midjourney’s medical scanner leaves many questions unanswered
stories.simple_summary: A company called Midjourney showed a video of an AI-powered ultrasound scanner it's developing, but hasn't proven it actually works yet.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mostly hype right now — the company is promoting something that isn't ready yet, so don't believe the promises until real doctors test it.

stories.title: Mom is an artificial intelligence pioneer. Her kids couldn’t disagree more about AI.
stories.simple_summary: A story about a mother who works on artificial intelligence and her children who have different opinions about whether AI is good or bad.
stories.why_it_matters: This is just a human interest story — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: The Enterprise Gives AI Models a Path to Consumer Loyalty
stories.simple_summary: AI tools are being used by businesses to help customers stay loyal and keep buying from them.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to big businesses — nothing you need to do.

stories.title: Mark Zuckerberg tells staff that AI agents haven’t progressed as quickly as he’d hoped
stories.simple_summary: Mark Zuckerberg (who runs Meta/Facebook) told his workers that AI robots and helpers are not improving as fast as he thought they would.
stories.why_it_matters: This means AI progress is slower than some people claim — don't believe all the hype about super-smart AI coming soon.

stories.title: Artificial intelligence: Yann LeCun works on more flexible AI
stories.simple_summary: A scientist named Yann LeCun is working on making AI more flexible and adaptable.
stories.why_it_matters: This is early research work — mostly relevant to engineers and investors.

stories.title: Read the Tense Emails Between the Pentagon (Former Uber Exec) and Anthropic (Dario Amodei)
stories.simple_summary: There were tense emails between the Pentagon and the AI company Anthropic about working together.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mostly relevant to investors and people interested in government policy — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Jersey Mike’s IPO illustrates how bad the AI hype has become
stories.simple_summary: Jersey Mike's sandwich shop mentioned AI in its public financial documents even though a sandwich shop has little to do with artificial intelligence.
stories.why_it_matters: This shows companies are putting AI in their paperwork just to sound trendy and impress investors, even when it's not real — don't be fooled by AI hype in marketing.
